title: A New Life for an Old Ring
article_text: Yesterday I discovered an old object in a dark box. The object was a beautiful ring with a female design. I tried to maintain the ring carefully because it looked very old. My friend said the ring might be dead, but I saw a possibility to clean it. I prefer to work on projects like this in the afternoon. The ring had a small screen that showed a track for a dance. I used a credit to buy a special cloth for cleaning. The shop had a facility with many different clothes for cleaning. I can see a variety of colors on the ring now, and it looks okay. I will extend my hobby because I can earn money from this work.

sentences.en: Yesterday I discovered an old object in a dark box.
sentences.zh: 昨天我在一个黑暗的盒子里发现了一个旧物品。

words.eng_def: found something for the first time
a thing you can see or touch

sentences.en: The object was a beautiful ring with a female design.
sentences.zh: 这个物品是一个带有女性设计的漂亮戒指。

words.eng_def: a thing you can see or touch
a piece of jewelry for a finger
related to women or girls

sentences.en: I tried to maintain the ring carefully because it looked very old.
sentences.zh: 我试着小心地保养这枚戒指，因为它看起来很旧。

words.eng_def: to keep something in good condition

sentences.en: My friend said the ring might be dead, but I saw a possibility to clean it.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友说这枚戒指可能没用了，但我看到了清洁它的可能性。

words.eng_def: not working or not alive

sentences.en: I prefer to work on projects like this in the afternoon.
sentences.zh: 我更喜欢在下午做这样的项目。

sentences.en: The ring had a small screen that showed a track for a dance.
sentences.zh: 这枚戒指有一个小屏幕，显示一段舞蹈的曲目。

sentences.en: I used a credit to buy a special cloth for cleaning.
sentences.zh: 我用信用卡买了一块特殊的清洁布。

words.eng_def: money that a bank lends you

sentences.en: The shop had a facility with many different clothes for cleaning.
sentences.zh: 这家店有一个设施，里面有许多不同的清洁布。

sentences.en: I can see a variety of colors on the ring now, and it looks okay.
sentences.zh: 我现在能看到戒指上有各种颜色，它看起来还行。

sentences.en: I will extend my hobby because I can earn money from this work.

image_prompts: A person opens a dark box and finds an old ring inside, with dust particles in the air.
Close-up of a beautiful ring with a floral female design on a wooden table.
A person carefully wiping the ring with a soft cloth, focused expression.
Two friends talking, one holding the ring, the other looking skeptical.
A person working at a desk in the afternoon sunlight, with the ring on the table.
The ring has a tiny glowing screen showing musical notes and a dance track.
A person swiping a credit card at a store counter, buying a cleaning cloth.
A shop interior with shelves of different cloths and cleaning tools.
The cleaned ring now shines with bright red, blue, and green colors on a hand.
A person smiling while putting money into a piggy bank, with the ring on their finger.
